title: Result - Luxembourg
content:
Welcome to Luxembourg, a tolerant and economically stable country in the heart of Europe, bordered by Germany, France and Belgium.
Known for cross-border cooperation, it boasts 3 official languages—French, German and Luxembourgish—while English is widely spoken.  Explore its stunning landscapes, with green valleys, dramatic rock formations and 112 kilometres of hiking trails through picturesque fields and forests, alongside a rich cultural and historical heritage.

## Unique food tradition
Gromperekichelcher (potato pancake): a popular street food made from spiced mashed potatoes formed into patties and deep-fried.
Luxembourg has embraced innovation, diversifying into information, space, environmental and health technologies while maintaining its leadership in financial and green finance sectors.

### Local legend or myth
Melusina: a water nymph who married Count Siegfried on the condition that he never sees her on Saturdays. When he breaks the vow she disappears into the river, returning only every 7 years, knitting a garment.

### Language of the Land
Luxembourg has 3 official languages: Luxembourgish, French and German.
of Luxembourg's population is foreign-born, making it one of the most diverse countries in Europe.
